Petition For An Order Directing The Return Of Estate Assets And Confirming Title To Assets
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court noted that mediation was successful and that Mr. Wurm has agreed to withdraw his objections. Status of mediation is off calendar. The Petition for an Order Directing the Return of Estate Assets and Confirming Title to Assets is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation

Petition For An Order Directing The Return Of Estate Assets And Confirming Title To Assets
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Continued To Aug-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For An Order Directing The Return Of Estate Assets And Confirming Title To Assets
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Continued To Jun-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for petitioner.
Michael Borden (friend of the decedent) in propria persona.
Michael Wurm (friend of the decedent/companion) in propria persona.
John Bolcik (friend of the decedent) in propria persona.

The court raised the issue of the allegation of a later will that was executed after the date of the will that was admitted to probate. Mr. Wrobel stated that the later will was incomplete, that it was not an original, that the difference in the two wills was not siginificant and that the substantive difference is that Michael Wurm was named as a successor executor in the later will. Mr. Borden spoke of the IRA having been released to Francine by Sterling Bank even though Mr. Wurm was the named beneficiary, circumstances that occurred at the bank, stated that Mr. Wurm has a copy of the latest will and that it is a complete copy, and that Mr. Wurm is not contesting to Francine getting the house. Further discussion was held regarding the notice of the initial petition for probate having been sent to an old address of Mr. Wurm, Mr. Wrobel having presented a check for $95,000.00 for the IRA to Mr. Wurm with conditions reagrding Mr. Wurn moving out and signing a release, Mr. Wurm's concern about the amount of time he will have to make other living arrangements, the possibility of Mr. Wurm needing to get a landlord tenant attorney, etc. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than June 5, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 17, 2024. The Petition for an Order Directing the Return of Estate Assets, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on June 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. A copy of the mediation order was provided to the parties that were present in court. Mr. Wrobel is to obtain a copy of the mediation order from the court's website.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 20, 2015 is admitted to probate. Casey Lynn Marnell is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 07, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
